name: image_ernie_image
description: Baidu ERNIE-Image 8B text-to-image — open-weight single-stream DiT with state-of-the-art precise text rendering and structured image generation. Uses the Mistral-3 3B text encoder, the Flux.2 VAE, and a 20-step Euler/simple KSampler at CFG 4. Local-only — requires the diffusion_models/ernie-image.safetensors, text_encoders/ministral-3-3b.safetensors, and vae/flux2-vae.safetensors files in your ComfyUI models directory (see https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ERNIE-Image). For a faster 8-step variant use image_ernie_image_turbo. Supported native resolutions: 1024x1024, 1264x848, 848x1264, 1376x768, 768x1376, 1200x896, 896x1200.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the image to generate. ERNIE-Image excels at precise text rendering and structured layouts (infographics, posters, multi-language signage).
